reference.note: The vendored .reference-haskell-cardano-node/install/ may lag the policy tag while a fresh checkout is in progress. Run scripts/setup-reference.sh to bring it up to the policy tag before relying on byte-equivalence claims.

status_legend.verified_11_0_1: Implemented and validated against the pinned 11.0.1 reference (forensic byte-equivalence, golden vectors, or live-rehearsal evidence).
status_legend.implemented_needs_11_0_1_evidence: Rust behavior exists and local tests pass, but live or golden 11.0.1 parity evidence is still required.
status_legend.partial: Only a subset of the Haskell behavior exists; remaining work is listed explicitly.
status_legend.absent: No production implementation exists for the parity target.

entries.feature: Praos / TPraos slot leader election: VRF input construction, ActiveSlotCoeff, deterministic leader-value comparison

haskell_reference.role: Top-level Praos protocol entry points (checkIsLeader, validateVRFSignature).
VRF input construction (mkInputVRF) and leader-value range extension.
ActiveSlotCoeff source-of-truth and deterministic Taylor-series math.

rust_surface.role: Top-level leader-check entry points (check_leader_value, check_is_leader, verify_*_proof).
VrfMode / VrfUsage enums + praos_vrf_input / tpraos_vrf_seed / vrf_input.
ActiveSlotCoeff struct + leadership_threshold + taylor_exp_cmp.

implemented_evidence: R273a split praos.rs (793 lines) into praos/{vrf,common}.rs sub-modules mirroring upstream Praos/VRF and Cardano.Ledger.BaseTypes layout.

12-item public surface (ActiveSlotCoeff, VrfMode, VrfUsage, check_is_leader, check_leader_value, leadership_threshold, praos_vrf_input, tpraos_vrf_seed, verify_leader_proof, verify_leader_proof_output, verify_nonce_proof, vrf_input) preserved unchanged.
All four cargo gates green (fmt --check, check-all, lint, test-all) with 4,855 tests passing.
remaining_work: R266 step 3: forensic per-builtin CEK trace comparison vs upstream db-analyser to close the preview Plutus V2 budget gap (slot 1,462,057, tx 7bb40e40...3be5b9, 306,309 CPU drift).
R267: 24h+ mainnet endurance side-by-side with upstream cardano-node 11.0.1 to certify VRF leader checks across an epoch boundary.
acceptance: Forensic per-builtin trace matches upstream byte-for-byte for the failing tx.
24h mainnet endurance: zero leader-check divergence vs upstream cardano-node 11.0.1 across at least one full epoch.
Per-100-epoch ledger-hash byte-match on mainnet + preprod + preview.

entries.feature: Epoch nonce evolution state machine (UPDN per-block + TICKN epoch-boundary)

haskell_reference.role: UPDN rule: per-block evolving / candidate nonce update.
TICKN rule: epoch-boundary nonce transition.
hashVerifiedVRF (TPraos) baseline.

rust_surface.role: Module shell + tests + 6-item re-export (NonceDerivation, derive_vrf_nonce, NonceEvolutionConfig, NonceEvolutionState, etc).
VRF-output-to-nonce: TPraos hashVerifiedVRF + Praos vrfNonceValue.
NonceEvolutionConfig + NonceEvolutionState + UPDN/TICKN apply_block + chain-dep-state CBOR sidecar.

implemented_evidence: R273b split nonce.rs (832 lines) into nonce/{derivation,evolution}.rs mirroring TPraos.Rules.Updn / Rules.Tickn / BaseTypes layout.
Byron/Shelley extra-entropy transition path covered with a regression test pinning the R263 fix.
Chain-dep-state CBOR encode/decode round-trips through the persisted sidecar at every epoch boundary.
remaining_work: R267: per-epoch byte-match against upstream cardano-node 11.0.1 chain-dep-state sidecar across at least one mainnet epoch transition.
acceptance: Zero nonce divergence across one full mainnet epoch boundary vs upstream 11.0.1.
Persisted chain-dep-state sidecar bytes match upstream's volatile-DB snapshot byte-for-byte.

entries.feature: Operational certificate counter validation: pre-Vasil (TPraos) lower-bound only, post-Vasil (Praos) tightened bounds

haskell_reference.role: OCert struct + KES period helpers (kesPeriod, checkKESPeriod).
TPraos OCERT rule (Shelley/Allegra/Mary/pre-Babbage counter validation).
Praos OCERT rule (Babbage+ Vasil HF tightened bounds).

rust_surface.role: Module shell + tests + 5-item re-export (OpCert, OcertCounters, OcertCounterRule, kes_period_of_slot, check_kes_period).
OpCert struct + KES period helpers.
OcertCounters + OcertCounterRule (TPraos vs Praos) + CBOR sidecar.

implemented_evidence: R273c split opcert.rs (856 lines) into opcert/{cert,counter}.rs.
OcertCounterRule::for_pv_major selects TPraos for PV<7 and Praos for PV>=7 — Vasil HF fork-point.
Counter validation tests cover both rules with regression vectors.
remaining_work: R267: forensic ledger-state diff at the Vasil-HF block (mainnet PV major 7 transition) to confirm the rule-switch matches upstream.
Mainnet 24h+ endurance to certify the post-Vasil tightened-bound rule under live block production.
acceptance: Per-block OcertCounters byte-match against upstream chain-dep-state sidecar across the Vasil HF boundary.
Zero counter-validation divergence across one mainnet epoch.

entries.feature: Fee-ordered mempool queue with TTL eviction, capacity overflow with strictly-lower-fee eviction, ledger revalidation

haskell_reference.role: Top-level mempool wrapper.
Mempool API (snapshot, addTxs, removeTxs).

rust_surface.role: Module wrapper + cross-module re-exports.
Supporting types (MempoolEntry, MempoolError, MempoolSnapshot, readers) + tests + sub-mod declarations.
Mempool fee-ordered queue policy struct + 17 methods.
SharedMempool Arc<RwLock<>> wrapper.

implemented_evidence: R273d split mempool/queue.rs (1,665 lines) into queue/{inner,shared}.rs.
Capacity-overflow eviction matches upstream Impl.Update.makeRoomForTransaction (only strictly-lower-fee tail; rejection if cumulative-fee criterion fails).
Cross-peer TxId dedup via SharedTxState (R273e split tx_state.rs).
remaining_work: R267: live mainnet TxSubmission2 endurance test confirming snapshot-shape byte-equivalence with upstream cardano-node 11.0.1 inbound state.
acceptance: Per-snapshot byte-match against upstream MempoolSnapshot under 24h of inbound TxSubmission2 traffic on mainnet.

implemented_evidence: R273f split diffusion_pipelining.rs (747 lines) into identity + state mirroring upstream Shelley.Node.DiffusionPipelining + Block.SupportsDiffusionPipelining.

acceptance: Tentative-header advertisement under 24h mainnet traffic produces zero trap-header false-positives or false-negatives vs upstream.

entries.feature: BIP-0173 / Bech32m address encoding tool — pure-Rust port mirroring upstream IntersectMBO/bech32.

haskell_reference.role: Upstream Haskell source root for bech32 (vendored R326b).

rust_surface.role: Yggdrasil pure-Rust port — R327 skeleton; concrete implementation lands across the A.1 sub-arc per the R326–R459 sister-tools port plan.

implemented_evidence: Phase A.1 closure (R331-R334).
R331 skeleton: file-mirror tree wired (lib.rs <-> Codec/Binary/Bech32.hs, internal.rs <-> Codec/Binary/Bech32/Internal.hs, main.rs <-> bech32/app/Main.hs).
R332 CLI parser: byte-equivalent --help and --version output captured from upstream bech32 1.1.10 binary.

R333 concrete encode/decode: HumanReadablePart, DataPart, Bech32Error, InputEncoding all backed by real bech32 + bs58 + hex crates. detect_encoding() mirrors upstream's heuristic byte-for-byte. Drop-in deployment proof: byte-equivalent output for every documented upstream --help example.
R334 closeout: AGENTS.md updated to deployment-ready state with comparison-with-upstream procedure; CHANGELOG entry; parity-matrix transition partial -> verified_11_0_1.
Pure-Rust deps used: bech32 v0.11 (MIT, BIP-0173/Bech32m), bs58 v0.5 (MIT/Apache-2.0, Bitcoin alphabet), hex v0.4 (MIT/Apache-2.0). All license-compatible per deny.toml.
Test count: 31 (23 unit + 8 integration). Workspace: 4856 -> 4887 (+31).
Drop-in invocation: `node/scripts/run-tools.sh bech32 <args>` produces byte-equivalent output to `.reference-haskell-cardano-node/install/bin/bech32 <args>`.
acceptance: ✓ `bech32 --help` byte-equivalent to upstream (golden-test pinned).
✓ Per-subcommand stdout/stderr byte-equivalent on documented fixtures (4 round-trip tests pass).
✓ `node/scripts/run-tools.sh bech32` invokes the yggdrasil binary; SPO automation can swap upstream binary without script change.
✓ Strict-mirror gate green (every production .rs declares one of two canonical docstring forms).
✓ `cargo test -p yggdrasil-bech32` green.
✓ Parity-matrix entry: status verified_11_0_1.
